description: A customer who bought concert tickets wants to add a backstage meet-and-greet pass.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's concert ticket booking.
Check if the backstage pass add-on is available for this event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that backstage passes are available for purchase.

nodes.task_description: Sell the backstage pass to the customer, process the payment, and issue an updated ticket/voucher.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sells the add-on and provides the customer with the necessary credentials.
